chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1206 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 04-03-2025 Mr. Ratan Kumar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G Sindh. **** Learned AAG files comments/statements on behalf of respondents No.2,3&5, taken on record. After arguing the matter at some length, learned counsel for petitioner submits that the petitioner intends to exhaust the alternate remedy before the proper forum/competent Court of law for redressal of his grievance; therefore, under instructions, he does not press the instant petition. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed leaving the petitioner at liberty to avail the alternate remedy before the competent Court of law/forum having jurisdiction, if he desires so. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
